narrative:
Jackson 14 (precinct in Stark County) has 996 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
